abort.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices were found. Add your Pivot device to ESPHome first.

error.cannot_read_device_name: Could not determine the ESPHome device name. Check the ESPHome integration logs.
error.device_not_found: The selected device could not be found in the device registry.
error.must_confirm_firmware: You must confirm the device is running Pivot firmware before continuing.
error.suffix_collision: This device suffix is already in use by another Pivot entry. Choose a different suffix.

user.title: Select your Pivot device
user.description: Choose the ESPHome device running Pivot firmware.

confirm.title: Confirm firmware and device suffix
confirm.description: Confirm that **{device_name}** is running Pivot firmware, then review the device suffix. The suffix is used to build entity IDs — it must match what the firmware expects.

options.title: Announcement settings
options.description: Configure spoken announcements for **{device_name}**. TTS and media player are optional — announcements can be enabled later.

banks_initial.title: Assign entities to banks
banks_initial.description: Choose which entity each bank controls. You can change these later via the integration options.

banks.title: Assign entities to banks
banks.description: Choose which entity each bank controls.
